name: Mango Chia Seed Pudding
description: Creamy overnight chia pudding with fresh mango and coconut milk — no cooking required.
recipeInstructions: Add mango, yogurt, coconut milk, and vanilla extract to a blender. Blend until smooth.
Pour into a bowl or jar and stir in chia seeds. Mix well.
Top with additional mango chunks, nuts of choice, and/or desiccated coconut.
